style_name: tropical vacation anime pop within vivid idol anime with high-clarity accent palette
song_motif: sunlit wave arcs and coral orange shell glints marking release from routine

color_rules.base: dark navy and deep space backgrounds
color_rules.shadow_color: deep purple and dark navy shadow

transition_language: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes through sunlit wave arcs and coral orange shell glints marking release from routine, rose gold reflections, and tropical percussion sparkle, warm bass pulse, sea-breeze motion, polished K-pop brightness
